description: Golden-set calibration ideas with expected score bands. The calibration.mjs script scores these and verifies the result falls within the expected band. This is a regression test for the framework weights and aggregation math — it does NOT test the LLM scoring itself, it uses pre-computed factor_scores that represent what a correctly-calibrated scorer should produce.

ideas.title: Photoshop clone (web-based)
ideas.description: A browser-based photo editor competing with Photoshop, Figma, Canva. Full layer system, filters, effects, export to multiple formats.

ideas.title: AniRec v2 (mood-aware anime recommender)
ideas.description: Upgrade of the user's existing AniRec Replit app. Subjective mood queries with Claude, MyAnimeList OAuth, €3-5/month freemium.

ideas.title: Generic SMS gateway wrapper
ideas.description: A wrapper around Twilio SMS API with nice UI. €5/month. Anyone can build it in a weekend.

ideas.title: Chrome extension — bookmark dedupe
ideas.description: Simple Chrome extension that finds and removes duplicate bookmarks. One-time €4 license. Ships in 40 hours.

ideas.title: B2B healthcare record management system
ideas.description: Full EHR for small clinics. HIPAA-compliant. $299/month/user. Long sales cycle, committee buying.
